reviews.review_msg: Yes this class was a lot of work and difficult, but if you put in a lot of effort you can get an A for sure! She was really nice and always explained things if you didn't understand. Tests were more on the difficult side, so be sure to study very hard! This class made me love earth science and look forward to lectures! Recommended!

She had interesting lectures which I really enjoyed. When it came to the test, I studied so hard, but didn't do as well as I had hoped. It was all multiple choice, which was annoying! The class was shared with another prof, whose test was way better (A!). All in all, good class and material, but the multiple choice is not a good idea!
